name: Swazi
notes: Swazi / Swati (siSwati) — Nguni (Bantu) language, official in Eswatini and South Africa. Written in the Latin script with the Nguni conjunctive orthography (Eswatini and South African spelling conventions differ slightly). GRAPHEME INVENTORY NOT YET SPECIFIED: an accurate spec must model the click consonants, breathy/depressor consonants, prenasalised and ejective series and multi-letter digraphs; tone is not written. INPUT CONTRACT: input is expected in the standard Latin-script siSwati orthography.
